text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The book *Multi-armed Bandit Allocation Indices* is real and was indeed published by John Wiley & Sons in 1989, authored by J. C. Gittins. The automated checker's "first author mismatch" flagging "P. W. Jones" appears to be a database error; every independent source (Wiley, Amazon, AbeBooks, SIAM Review, Google Books) confirms J. C. Gittins as the sole/lead author of the 1989 first edition.
LINK: https://www.abebooks.com/9780471920595/Multi-Armed-Bandit-Allocation-Indices-Wiley-0471920592/plp
